scripts.build: pnpm run generate:icons && pnpm run build:tsdown
scripts.prebuild:storybook: pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens
scripts.prebuild:tsdown: pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens
scripts.check: pnpm run check:format && pnpm run check:lint && pnpm run check:types
scripts.precheck:types: pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens && pnpm run generate:icons
scripts.check:types: pnpm run check:types:storybook && pnpm run check:types:browser && pnpm run check:types:node
scripts.precheck:types:browser: pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens
scripts.predev:storybook: pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens && pnpm run generate:icons && rm -rf node_modules/.cache/storybook node_modules/.vite-storybook
scripts.predev:tsdown: pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens
scripts.fix: pnpm run fix:format && pnpm run fix:lint
scripts.generate: pnpm run generate:icons && pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens
scripts.generate:entries: pnpm run generate:icons && tsx scripts/generate-entries.ts && pnpm exec tsc -p scripts/tsconfig.generated.json
scripts.pretest: pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens
scripts.pretest:ui: pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens
scripts.pretest:watch: pnpm run generate:entries && pnpm run generate:color-tokens
